rationale: API ergonomics improvement: detect circular references and throw catchable exception instead of fatal StackOverflow.
StackOverflow from NHibernate PersistentGenericBag circular reference; C#-specific ORM serialization crash, no spec rule violated.
C#-specific deserialization bug: cannot deserialize System.Object from BsonType Array; language-binding issue, not a spec rule.
LINQ NullReferenceException with derived type queries; C#-specific LINQ/ORM mapping bug, no spec area involved.
C#-specific LINQ improvement: allow constant on either side of comparison operator; no spec rule involved.
LINQ DateTime comparison unsupported; C#-specific LINQ provider limitation, no MongoDB spec rule violated.
Add new IsDatabaseNameValid/IsCollectionNameValid API methods; purely additive API improvement, no spec involvement.
GridFS Dispose() updates MD5 even on read-only streams; C#-specific disposal semantics bug, not a GridFS spec rule violation.
Documentation improvement: indicate where to get support; pure docs/community issue, no spec involvement.
BsonArray crashes on null values; implementation crashes, but no specific BSON spec rule cited as violated.
LINQ throws on string method calls (ToLower, Trim, etc.); C#-specific LINQ provider limitation, no spec rule.
Add new AsQueryable<T> overload for typed MongoCollection; API ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
Connection failure due to configuration system error; user environment issue, no spec rule involved.
Document circular reference stack overflow behavior; documentation improvement, no spec rule involved.
Allow disabling filemd5 call on GridFS upload; API improvement/feature request, not a spec nonconformance.
FindAndModify returns null ModifiedDocument with returnNew=true; likely querying non-existent doc; resolved same day as support question.
Query.In with BsonArray wraps in extra array layer; C#-specific query builder bug, no specific CRUD spec rule cited.
Add serialization support for readonly properties; C#-specific language-binding feature request, no spec area.
GridFS spec requires uploadDate to be set on file creation; driver fails to set it in OpenCreate().
DateTime stored with milliseconds but query serializer omits them; C#-specific serialization inconsistency, no specific BSON spec rule.
MongoCursor NullReferenceException when SetFields called; C#-specific implementation crash, no spec rule violated.
Concurrent modification of _instances list during iteration; threading implementation bug, no spec rule.
MongoServer.Ping race condition with non-thread-safe ToArray(); threading implementation bug, no spec rule.
QueryBuilder.In always throws due to BsonArray.Contains rejecting null check; regression bug in 1.4.1, no spec rule.
Undocumented breaking change in SetDocumentId; API documentation issue, no spec rule violated.
Deadlock between _serverLock and _connectionPoolLock; threading/locking implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule.
Add Query.In overload for IEnumerable<ObjectId>; API ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
Performance improvement: cache serializers and discriminator conventions; internal optimization, no spec rule.
Performance improvement: use fixed-size array instead of HashSet; internal optimization, no spec rule.
ObjectId.TryParse throws on null instead of returning false; .NET API convention violation, not a MongoDB spec rule.
Internal refactor of Bson library; no behavior change, no spec rule involved.
LINQ queries against MongoCursor execute in-memory instead of server-side; C#-specific LINQ feature request, no spec.
SetIdMember ignores ElementName set on member map; C#-specific class-map serialization bug, no spec rule.
Default values applied during deserialization even when not explicitly configured; C#-specific serialization regression, no spec rule.
Fix LINQ tutorial documentation for Inject() usage; docs bug, no spec involvement.
MapReduce fails with SetSortOrder option; C#-specific query builder bug, no specific spec rule cited.
User-defined generic collection types incorrectly serialized; C#-specific serialization framework bug, no BSON spec rule violated.
Array item serialization options not applied at deserialization; C#-specific attribute handling bug, no BSON spec rule.
JSON ObjectId round-trip fails; Python mentioned as comparison but primary issue is C# JavaScriptSerializer compatibility bug.
LINQ unsupported where clause with DateTime.Add; C#-specific LINQ provider limitation, no spec rule.
Update.SetWrapped throws NullReferenceException when value is null; C#-specific null-handling regression, no spec rule.
Integer truncation for >2GB GridFS files; C#-specific integer overflow bug, no GridFS spec rule about int/long types.
RunCommand sends boolean true instead of integer 1 for command name; wire protocol requires numeric 1, causing server rejection.
CreateCollection throws on existing collection instead of returning error; C#-specific API behavior/doc improvement, no spec rule.
Test driver in Medium Trust environment; platform/environment testing task, no spec rule involved.
New untyped Query builder API improvement; API ergonomics/refactoring, no spec rule involved.
BsonObjectId doesn't support System.Convert.ToString; C#-specific IConvertible implementation bug, no spec rule.
GridFS calls ensureIndex even for read-only connections; C#-specific implementation bug, no GridFS spec rule about read-only access.
CreateIndex throws when options built separately; C#-specific builder API bug, no spec rule involved.
NullReferenceException in LINQ First() call; C#-specific LINQ/in-memory filtering bug, no spec rule.
